description: Drive the full BMAD workflow for one story end-to-end: branch, create-story, dev-story, risk-gated TEA, the code-review loop, epic-boundary gates, a commit per step, PR, and report. Delegates every step to a model/effort-tuned subagent.
outputs: Story branch + per-step commits; optional PR; appended run report under {output_folder}/auto-bmad/reports/

description: Drive a WHOLE epic end-to-end in one run: one epic branch, the autonomous create-story -> dev-story loop per story each with a thin review+fix, then ONE epic integration review (no human halt — review decisions auto-resolved) + one PR. Warns and confirms up front (no per-story checkpoints); completes a half-done epic.
outputs: One epic/{e}-slug branch + per-story commits; one PR; epic report under {output_folder}/auto-bmad/reports/epic-{e}.md

description: Register the module and (re)render the tool-native delegate agents from the configurable model/effort profiles; run after editing profiles or to add a tool. reset-defaults discards profile retunes in config.yaml and re-seeds the shipped defaults (re-renders if needed). config-check previews (read-only) what an update would add and what you've customised vs the defaults.
outputs: Registered abm in the shared help CSV plus rendered .claude/agents and/or .codex/agents; reset-defaults re-seeds config.yaml profiles (prior copy saved to config.yaml.bak)
